slot_payload.hero_problem: Leaking water heater flooding your garage?
slot_payload.hero_solution: Fast, guaranteed water heater repair, often the same day.
slot_payload.problem_explainer: A failing water heater disrupts every routine in the home — cold showers, rising bills, and the risk of water damage. The longer it waits, the more it costs.
slot_payload.solution_overview: Our licensed technicians diagnose the fault, quote upfront, and repair on the spot whenever possible — with workmanship backed in writing.
slot_payload.why_us: Licensed, insured, and fully warrantied — every repair is backed by our written guarantee.

testimonial.quote: They fixed our heater the same morning we called.
testimonial.author: Dana R., Austin

faq.question: How fast can you come out?

faq.answer: You get an upfront quote before any work begins.

faq.answer: Yes — parts and labor are warrantied.
